Home / Residential / Plumbing / Bathroom Plumbing

Residential Plumbing

Bathroom Plumbing — Every Fixture, Every Fix

From a running toilet to a full bathroom remodel, our licensed plumbers handle all bathroom plumbing work with precision and care. We work around your schedule and leave the space cleaner than we found it.

Services Included

  • Toilet Repair & Installation
  • Bathroom Sink Repair & Replacement
  • Faucet Repair & Installation
  • Tub & Shower Plumbing
  • Shower Pan & Valve Replacement
  • Drain Repair & Replacement
  • Bathroom Remodel Plumbing

Why Choose Silver State?

🔧

Licensed Plumbers

Fully licensed and insured in all 5 states.

⚡

Same-Day Service

Most calls serviced the same day.

💰

Upfront Pricing

No hidden charges. Quote before work begins.

🕐

24/7 Emergency

Plumbing emergencies answered around the clock.

Frequently Asked Questions

Why is my toilet running constantly?

Usually a worn flapper, faulty fill valve, or a float set too high. Most running toilet repairs take under an hour and cost a fraction of the wasted water bill.

Can you match my existing fixtures?

We carry a wide selection of fixtures and can order specific brands or finishes to match your existing bathroom aesthetic.

Do you handle shower valve replacements?

Yes — including pressure-balancing valves, thermostatic valves, and complete shower valve system upgrades.
